---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition to LoreLake.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What isn't working well today? Describe the situation you run into — not the solution.

## Proposal

What would you like LoreLake to do? If you have more than one idea, pick the one you'd reach for first.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why did you rule those out?

## Scope check

Is this a schema change, a new writer/skill, a new config key, or a doc change? This helps reviewers decide whether a spec is needed first (see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/clawbakk/lorelake/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)).
